title: Scanner integration (index.ts) — flag-gated, appended last, no-op when off
acceptance_criteria: Behind `features.complianceScanning`, AFTER the accessibility block, build ComplianceContext from the accessibility result (accessibilityScore + scoreSource) and crawlResult.renderMode, call runComplianceModules, push findings, set moduleFindingCounts['P5-Compliance'], and spread complianceFrameworkSummary onto the returned ScannerResult (optional spread like the sibling blocks)
Wrapped in try/catch — a compliance failure must not fail the scan (logger.error, continue), matching the perf/a11y/seo blocks

BYTE-IDENTICAL FLAG-OFF: when features.complianceScanning is false, NO compliance code path runs, NO new key appears on ScannerResult, findings/moduleFindingCounts ordering is unchanged vs pre-feature. The P5 group is appended strictly last
npm run lint, npm run test, npm run build all pass
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
